request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - our town's emergency services were caught completely unprepared during the last power outage. If we can't even handle basic local disruptions, how are we supposed to trust the government to protect us from real threats? Strategic autonomy sounds great, but we need to make sure our own house is in order first. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
